prompt: Create a hyper-realistic vertical fashion street photograph of a glamorous gyaru-style young woman walking in heavy rain at night outside a luxury hotel entrance, with a cinematic low-angle wide-lens perspective from near the wet pavement. She holds a transparent umbrella covered in raindrops above her head, her face intentionally covered by a plain brown rectangular privacy block. She has long wavy blonde hair cascading over her shoulders and wears a white cropped sleeveless top and cream pleated mini skirt, a thin gold chain belt, and glossy bright red knee-high monogram-pattern rain boots with chunky soles. One boot is planted on the reflective sidewalk while the other is lifted forward toward the camera, splashing water dramatically from the sole in a clear arc of droplets. She carries exactly 1 black designer-style shoulder bag with chain strap on her left shoulder, decorated with exactly 2 plush leopard-print teddy bear charms. Add jewelry details: bracelets, rings, manicured nails, and a confident fashion-model pose. The setting is THE PENINSULA hotel façade with warm golden entrance lights, stone architecture, glass canopy, lanterns, potted greenery, and a rain-soaked city street receding into the background with car headlights, neon reflections, and tall buildings. Emphasize wet skin texture, glossy boots, transparent umbrella ribs, sparkling raindrops, puddle reflections, bokeh city lights, and high-end editorial realism. Use dramatic perspective distortion, sharp foreground water splash, rich contrast, warm hotel lighting against cool rainy blue-black night tones, no extra people, no watermark.
